posts.author: David.S (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Make the Eye / Hide menu taller so it can display more columns without needing to scroll so much.

What are you trying to achieve

We have boards with many columns and need to be able to easily reorder the columns
If the Hide menu / Eye menu could display more columns, it would be easier to reorder and hide / unhide columns without needing to scroll so much.
